Row.Text: Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{unit_settler_location}{settler1_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler2_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler3_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler4_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler5_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler6_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler7_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler8_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler9_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler10_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler11_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler12_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler13_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler14_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler15_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler16_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler17_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler18_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler19_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.{settler20_location}
Founds new Cities to expand your empire.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_FOOD] Growth of the City is stopped while this Unit is being built.
Improves [ICON_FOOD] Food [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production and [ICON_GOLD] Gold by constructing Improvements on map tiles outside of Cities.{unit_worker_location}
Improves [ICON_FOOD] Food [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production and [ICON_GOLD] Gold by constructing Improvements on map tiles outside of Cities.

Creates Improvements on water resources like [ICON_RES_FISH] Fish. The Work Boat is consumed in the process. It is defenseless, and will be killed if it comes into contact with an enemy.{unit_work_boat_location}
Creates Improvements on water resources like [ICON_RES_FISH] Fish. The Work Boat is consumed in the process. It is defenseless, and will be killed if it comes into contact with an enemy.
Naval Unit specialized in warding off enemy aircraft. Can hold 3 Missiles. Used to hunt down and destroy enemy Submarines.{unit_missile_cruiser_location}
Naval Unit specialized in warding off enemy aircraft. Can hold 3 Missiles. Used to hunt down and destroy enemy Submarines.

Invisible to all Units except Destroyers, Missile Cruisers and other Submarines, or until it attacks or is adjacent to another unit. Can carry 2 Missiles, and is specialized in attacking Naval Units.{unit_nuclear_submarine_location}
Invisible to all Units except Destroyers, Missile Cruisers and other Submarines, or until it attacks or is adjacent to another unit. Can carry 2 Missiles, and is specialized in attacking Naval Units.
Initially carries 2 Aircraft; capacity may be boosted through promotions.{unit_carrier_location}
Initially carries 2 Aircraft; capacity may be boosted through promotions.
Most powerful ranged Naval unit in the game until the Missile Cruiser.{unit_battleship_location}
Most powerful ranged Naval unit in the game until the Missile Cruiser.

Invisible to all Units except Destroyers, Missile Cruisers and other Submarines, or until it attacks or is adjacent to another unit. Can cause major damage to other ships if they get into range without being seen.{unit_submarine_location}

Invisible to all Units except Destroyers, Missile Cruisers and other Submarines, or until it attacks or is adjacent to another unit. Can cause major damage to other ships if they get into range without being seen.
Fast late game ship making it highly effective at recon. Also used to hunt down and destroy enemy Submarines. Fights as a naval melee unit.{unit_destroyer_location}
Fast late game ship making it highly effective at recon. Also used to hunt down and destroy enemy Submarines. Fights as a naval melee unit.
A very powerful naval melee unit, the Ironclad pays for its strength by being slower in ocean tiles.{unit_ironclad_location}
A very powerful naval melee unit, the Ironclad pays for its strength by being slower in ocean tiles.
Powerful Renaissance Era naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas.{unit_frigate_location}
Powerful Renaissance Era naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas.
Powerful Renaissance Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas. Only the English may build it.{unit_frigate_location}
Powerful Renaissance Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas. Only the English may build it.
Fast Renaissance exploration Unit with an enhanced sight radius that can enter Ocean. Fights as a naval melee unit.{unit_caravel_location}
Fast Renaissance exploration Unit with an enhanced sight radius that can enter Ocean. Fights as a naval melee unit.
Ancient Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas through melee attacks on naval units and cities.{unit_trireme_location}
Ancient Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas through melee attacks on naval units and cities.
Isn't benefiting from any defensive terrain bonuses, but is otherwise stronger than any other military unit in the game.{unit_mech_location}
Isn't benefiting from any defensive terrain bonuses, but is otherwise stronger than any other military unit in the game.

Unleash nuclear destruction upon your foes. Does great damage to Cities and damages any Unit caught in the blast radius.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Requires Manhattan Project and two Uranium resources.{unit_nuclear_missile_location}
Unleash nuclear destruction upon your foes. Does great damage to Cities and damages any Unit caught in the blast radius.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Requires Manhattan Project and two Uranium resources.
A long-range Air Unit that rains death from above onto enemy Units and Cities.{unit_stealth_bomber_location}
A long-range Air Unit that rains death from above onto enemy Units and Cities.
Air Unit designed to wrest control of the skies and intercept incoming enemy aircraft.{unit_jet_fighter_location}
Air Unit designed to wrest control of the skies and intercept incoming enemy aircraft.
A cheap Unit that may be used once to damage enemy Units or Cities.{unit_guided_missile_location}
A cheap Unit that may be used once to damage enemy Units or Cities.
Unit specialized in fighting Modern Armor and Tanks. It is capable of hovering over mountains, but takes damage if ending its turn on one.{unit_helicopter_gunship_location}
Unit specialized in fighting Modern Armor and Tanks. It is capable of hovering over mountains, but takes damage if ending its turn on one.
Will intercept enemy aircraft which try to bomb nearby Units.{unit_mobile_sam_location}
Will intercept enemy aircraft which try to bomb nearby Units.
Fast Siege Unit of the late-game. Unlike other Siege Units, it does not need to set up prior to firing.{unit_rocket_artillery_location}
Fast Siege Unit of the late-game. Unlike other Siege Units, it does not need to set up prior to firing.
Fast, basic Unit of the late-game that requires no special resources to build.{unit_mechanized_infantry_location}
Fast, basic Unit of the late-game that requires no special resources to build.

Unleash nuclear destruction upon your foes. Does great damage to Cities and damages any Unit caught in the blast radius. May be stationed on Aircraft Carriers.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Requires Manhattan Project and a Uranium resource.{unit_atomic_bomb_location}

Unleash nuclear destruction upon your foes. Does great damage to Cities and damages any Unit caught in the blast radius. May be stationed on Aircraft Carriers.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Requires Manhattan Project and a Uranium resource.
Air Unit that rains death from above onto enemy Units and Cities.{unit_bomber_location}
Air Unit that rains death from above onto enemy Units and Cities.

Air Unit that rains death from above onto enemy Units and Cities. Only the Americans may build it. This Unit has a chance of evading interception, and does additional damage to Cities compared to the Bomber, which it replaces.{unit_bomber_location}

Air Unit that rains death from above onto enemy Units and Cities. Only the Americans may build it. This Unit has a chance of evading interception, and does additional damage to Cities compared to the Bomber, which it replaces.
Air Unit designed to wrest control of the skies and intercept incoming enemy aircraft.{unit_fighter_location}
Air Unit designed to wrest control of the skies and intercept incoming enemy aircraft.

Air Unit designed to wrest control of the skies and intercept incoming enemy aircraft. Only the Japanese may build it. This Unit has a bonus against other Fighters and does not require Oil.{unit_fighter_location}
Air Unit designed to wrest control of the skies and intercept incoming enemy aircraft. Only the Japanese may build it. This Unit has a bonus against other Fighters and does not require Oil.

Strong infantry Unit capable of paradropping up to 9 tiles from friendly territory. Paratrooper can also move and pillage after paradropping, but cannot enter combat until the following turn.{unit_paratrooper_location}
Strong infantry Unit capable of paradropping up to 9 tiles from friendly territory. Paratrooper can also move and pillage after paradropping, but cannot enter combat until the following turn.
Fast and powerful late game Unit.{unit_tank_location}
Fast and powerful late game Unit.
Fast and powerful late game Unit.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Only the Germans may build it. This Unit has 1 additional movement compared to the Tank, which it replaces.{unit_tank_location}
Fast and powerful late game Unit.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Only the Germans may build it. This Unit has 1 additional movement compared to the Tank, which it replaces.
The first Siege Unit in the game capable of firing 3 tiles away. Must set up prior to firing.{unit_artillery_location}
The first Siege Unit in the game capable of firing 3 tiles away. Must set up prior to firing.
Will intercept enemy aircraft which try to bomb nearby Units.{unit_anti_aircraft_gun_location}
Will intercept enemy aircraft which try to bomb nearby Units.
Relatively cheap Unit specialized in fighting Tanks.{unit_anti_tank_gun_location}
Relatively cheap Unit specialized in fighting Tanks.
Most powerful Infantry Unit in the game until Mechanized Infantry.{unit_infantry_location}
Most powerful Infantry Unit in the game until Mechanized Infantry.
Mounted Unit capable of fighting toe-to-toe with contemporary infantry units.{unit_cavalry_location}
Mounted Unit capable of fighting toe-to-toe with contemporary infantry units.

Mounted Unit capable of fighting toe-to-toe with contemporary infantry units. [NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Only the Russians may build it. This Unit has a combat bonus when fighting enemies that have already taken damage.{unit_cavalry_location}

Mounted Unit capable of fighting toe-to-toe with contemporary infantry units. [NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Only the Russians may build it. This Unit has a combat bonus when fighting enemies that have already taken damage.
Strong, front-line land Unit of the mid-game.{unit_rifleman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit of the mid-game.
Mounted Unit specialized in defeating enemy Mounted Units.{unit_lancer_location}
Mounted Unit specialized in defeating enemy Mounted Units.
Mounted Unit specialized in defeating enemy Mounted Units. May only be built by the Ottomans. This Unit is faster and can see further than the Lancer, which it replaces.{unit_lancer_location}
Mounted Unit specialized in defeating enemy Mounted Units. May only be built by the Ottomans. This Unit is faster and can see further than the Lancer, which it replaces.
Powerful Renaissance Era Siege Unit. Must set up prior to firing.{unit_cannon_location}
Powerful Renaissance Era Siege Unit. Must set up prior to firing.
First gunpowder Unit of the game. Fairly cheap and powerful.{unit_musketman_location}
First gunpowder Unit of the game. Fairly cheap and powerful.

One of the first gunpowder units of the game. Only the Americans may build it. Replaces the Musketman. This Unit may move through rough ground as though it were flat, receives a bonus when fighting in rough terrain, and earns points toward a [ICON_GOLDEN_AGE] Golden Age when it defeats an enemy.{unit_musketman_location}

One of the first gunpowder units of the game. Only the Americans may build it. Replaces the Musketman. This Unit may move through rough ground as though it were flat, receives a bonus when fighting in rough terrain, and earns points toward a [ICON_GOLDEN_AGE] Golden Age when it defeats an enemy.
One of the first gunpowder units of the game. Only the French may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Musketman, which it replaces.{unit_musketman_location}
One of the first gunpowder units of the game. Only the French may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Musketman, which it replaces.

One of the first gunpowder units of the game. Only the Ottomans may build it. This Unit is stronger on offense and heals when it kills an enemy, unlike the Musketman which it replaces.{unit_musketman_location}
One of the first gunpowder units of the game. Only the Ottomans may build it. This Unit is stronger on offense and heals when it kills an enemy, unlike the Musketman which it replaces.

Powerful Medieval infantry Unit. Only the Japanese may build it. This Unit fights more effectively and helps produce Great Generals more quickly than the Longswordsman, which it replaces. Embarked Samurai can build Fishing Boats in one turn without being consumed (which makes them useful even in times of peace).{unit_longswordsman_location}

Powerful Medieval infantry Unit. Only the Japanese may build it. This Unit fights more effectively and helps produce Great Generals more quickly than the Longswordsman, which it replaces. Embarked Samurai can build Fishing Boats in one turn without being consumed (which makes them useful even in times of peace).
Powerful Medieval Siege Unit, good at reducing the defenses of enemy Cities. Must set up prior to firing.{unit_trebuchet_location}
Powerful Medieval Siege Unit, good at reducing the defenses of enemy Cities. Must set up prior to firing.
Powerful Medieval Mounted Unit, weak to Pikemen.{unit_knight_location}
Powerful Medieval Mounted Unit, weak to Pikemen.
Fast Medieval ranged Unit, weak to Pikemen. Only the Arabians may build it. It is a ranged unit, unlike the Knight which it replaces.{unit_knight_location}
Fast Medieval ranged Unit, weak to Pikemen. Only the Arabians may build it. It is a ranged unit, unlike the Knight which it replaces.

Powerful Medieval Mounted Unit, weak to Pikemen. Only the Siamese may build it. This Unit receives a bonus against other mounted Units and has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Knight, which it replaces.{unit_knight_location}

Powerful Medieval Mounted Unit, weak to Pikemen. Only the Siamese may build it. This Unit receives a bonus against other mounted Units and has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Knight, which it replaces.
Powerful Medieval Mounted Unit, weak to Pikemen. Only the Songhai may build it. This Unit is not penalized when attacking Cities, unlike the Knight which it replaces.{unit_knight_location}
Powerful Medieval Mounted Unit, weak to Pikemen. Only the Songhai may build it. This Unit is not penalized when attacking Cities, unlike the Knight which it replaces.
Medieval ranged infantry Unit. Only the Chinese may build it. This Unit may fire twice in one turn, unlike the Crossbowman which it replaces.{unit_crossbowman_location}
Medieval ranged infantry Unit. Only the Chinese may build it. This Unit may fire twice in one turn, unlike the Crossbowman which it replaces.
Medieval ranged infantry Unit. Only the English may build it. This Unit has 1 additional range compared to the Crossbowman, which it replaces.{unit_crossbowman_location}
Medieval ranged infantry Unit. Only the English may build it. This Unit has 1 additional range compared to the Crossbowman, which it replaces.
Specialized in defeating Knights and other mounted Units.{unit_pikeman_location}
Specialized in defeating Knights and other mounted Units.

This unit is much cheaper than the Pikeman, and can pillage without using any movement points. Steals gold when attacking a city. Unlocked through the Mercenary Army social policy, these units may not be built; they must be purchased through gold. May move immediately after purchase.{unit_landsknecht_location}

This unit is much cheaper than the Pikeman, and can pillage without using any movement points. Steals gold when attacking a city. Unlocked through the Mercenary Army social policy, these units may not be built; they must be purchased through gold. May move immediately after purchase.
First siege Unit of the game. Does major damage to Units and Cities from a distance, but must set up prior to firing.{unit_catapult_location}
First siege Unit of the game. Does major damage to Units and Cities from a distance, but must set up prior to firing.

Siege Unit that does major damage from a distance, but must set up prior to firing. Only the Romans may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_RANGE_STRENGTH] Ranged Combat Strength than the Catapult, which it replaces.{unit_catapult_location}

Siege Unit that does major damage from a distance, but must set up prior to firing. Only the Romans may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_RANGE_STRENGTH] Ranged Combat Strength than the Catapult, which it replaces.
Fast and powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen.{unit_horseman_location}
Fast and powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen.

Fast and powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen. Only the Greeks may build it. This Unit is faster, has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength and helps produce Great Generals more quickly than the Horseman which it replaces.{unit_horseman_location}

Fast and powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen. Only the Greeks may build it. This Unit is faster, has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength and helps produce Great Generals more quickly than the Horseman which it replaces.
Strong, front-line land Unit of the Classical Era.{unit_swordsman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit of the Classical Era.

Strong, front-line land Unit of the Classical Era. Only the Iroquois may build it. This Unit receives a major bonus when fighting on Forest and Jungle, unlike the Swordsman which it replaces.{unit_swordsman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit of the Classical Era. Only the Iroquois may build it. This Unit receives a major bonus when fighting on Forest and Jungle, unlike the Swordsman which it replaces.
Strong, front-line land Unit of the Classical Era. Only the Romans may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Swordsman, which it replaces.{unit_swordsman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit of the Classical Era. Only the Romans may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Swordsman, which it replaces.
A fast Ranged Unit highly effective on flat ground.{unit_chariot_archer_location}
A fast Ranged Unit highly effective on flat ground.
A fast Ranged Unit. Only the Egyptians may build it. This Unit does not require [ICON_RES_HORSE] Horses to be built, unlike the Chariot Archer which it replaces.{unit_chariot_archer_location}
A fast Ranged Unit. Only the Egyptians may build it. This Unit does not require [ICON_RES_HORSE] Horses to be built, unlike the Chariot Archer which it replaces.

A fast Ranged Unit highly effective on flat ground. Only the Indians may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat and Ranged Strength than the Chariot Archer, which it replaces.{unit_chariot_archer_location}
A fast Ranged Unit highly effective on flat ground. Only the Indians may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat and Ranged Strength than the Chariot Archer, which it replaces.
Ancient Era Unit which specializes in defeating Mounted Units.{unit_spearman_location}
Ancient Era Unit which specializes in defeating Mounted Units.

Ancient Era Unit which specializes in defeating Mounted Units. Only the Greeks may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Spearman which it replaces.{unit_spearman_location}
Ancient Era Unit which specializes in defeating Mounted Units. Only the Greeks may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Spearman which it replaces.

Ancient Era Unit which specializes in defeating Mounted Units. Only the Persians may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength and heals more quickly than the Spearman, which it replaces.{unit_spearman_location}

Ancient Era Unit which specializes in defeating Mounted Units. Only the Persians may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength and heals more quickly than the Spearman, which it replaces.
Powerful Ancient Era ranged Unit that can strike foes from afar.{unit_archer_location}
Powerful Ancient Era ranged Unit that can strike foes from afar.
Excellent at exploring, this Unit is not slowed by rough terrain, but is vulnerable to attack.{unit_scout_location}
Excellent at exploring, this Unit is not slowed by rough terrain, but is vulnerable to attack.

Fairly weak early-game military Unit. Only the Aztecs may build it. This Unit fights more effectively in Jungle and heals damage when it kills an enemy Unit, unlike the Warrior which it replaces.{unit_warrior_location}
Fairly weak early-game military Unit. Only the Aztecs may build it. This Unit fights more effectively in Jungle and heals damage when it kills an enemy Unit, unlike the Warrior which it replaces.

This Mongolian Unique Unit replaces the standard Knight. It possesses a strong ranged attack, increased movement rate, and earns promotions 50% faster. Unit battles also contribute double the amount of points towards earning a Great General.{unit_knight_location}

This Mongolian Unique Unit replaces the standard Knight. It possesses a strong ranged attack, increased movement rate, and earns promotions 50% faster. Unit battles also contribute double the amount of points towards earning a Great General.

One of the first available ranged Units, this Incan Unique Unit replaces the Archer. The Slinger is no more powerful than the Archer, and is even more fragile if subjected to a melee attack. However it possesses a promotion that gives it a good chance to withdraw to the rear before an enemy.{unit_archer_location}

One of the first available ranged Units, this Incan Unique Unit replaces the Archer. The Slinger is no more powerful than the Archer, and is even more fragile if subjected to a melee attack. However it possesses a promotion that gives it a good chance to withdraw to the rear before an enemy.

Dominant military Unit of the Renaissance Era. Only Spain may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Musketman which it replaces, as well as the Bonus vs Mounted (50) promotion. However it is also more expensive to build.{unit_musketman_location}

Dominant military Unit of the Renaissance Era. Only Spain may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Musketman which it replaces, as well as the Bonus vs Mounted (50) promotion. However it is also more expensive to build.
Medieval Era unit that specializes in scouting and colonizing overseas. Only Spain may build it. Replaces the Knight.{unit_knight_location}
Medieval Era unit that specializes in scouting and colonizing overseas. Only Spain may build it. Replaces the Knight.
Ancient Era unit that strikes fear into nearby enemies making them less effective in combat. Only Polynesia may build it. Replaces the Warrior.{unit_warrior_location}
Ancient Era unit that strikes fear into nearby enemies making them less effective in combat. Only Polynesia may build it. Replaces the Warrior.

Strong, front-line land Unit of the Medieval Era that specializes in attacks from the sea. Only Denmark may build it. Replaces the Longswordsman, but is available earlier.{unit_longswordsman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit of the Medieval Era that specializes in attacks from the sea. Only Denmark may build it. Replaces the Longswordsman, but is available earlier.
Strong, front-line land Unit of the mid-game that specializes in operating in Snow, Tundra and Hills. Only Denmark may build it. Replaces the Rifleman.{unit_rifleman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit of the mid-game that specializes in operating in Snow, Tundra and Hills. Only Denmark may build it. Replaces the Rifleman.

Heavily-armored naval unit of the Renaissance Era that is extremely difficult to kill. However Turtle Ships cannot enter deep ocean hexes outside of the city borders. Only Korea may build it. Replaces the Caravel.{unit_caravel_location}

Heavily-armored naval unit of the Renaissance Era that is extremely difficult to kill. However Turtle Ships cannot enter deep ocean hexes outside of the city borders. Only Korea may build it. Replaces the Caravel.
Anti-personnel rocket unit of the Medieval Era. Strong against land units, but weak against cities. Only Korea may build it. Replaces the Trebuchet.{unit_trebuchet_location}
Anti-personnel rocket unit of the Medieval Era. Strong against land units, but weak against cities. Only Korea may build it. Replaces the Trebuchet.

One of the first available ranged Units, this Babylonian Unique Unit replaces the Archer. The Bowman can better withstand melee attacks than the standard Archer available to other civs.{unit_archer_location}
One of the first available ranged Units, this Babylonian Unique Unit replaces the Archer. The Bowman can better withstand melee attacks than the standard Archer available to other civs.

Only the Celts may build this unit. It has a combat bonus outside of friendly territory and can pillage enemy improvements at no additional movement cost. Earns 50% of opponents' strength as [ICON_PEACE] Faith for kills.{unit_spearman_location}

Only the Celts may build this unit. It has a combat bonus outside of friendly territory and can pillage enemy improvements at no additional movement cost. Earns 50% of opponents' strength as [ICON_PEACE] Faith for kills.
Only the Maya may build this unit. It is cheaper and available sooner than the Archer, which it replaces.{unit_archer_location}
Only the Maya may build this unit. It is cheaper and available sooner than the Archer, which it replaces.

Fast and powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen. Only the Byzantines may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength, defends better, and attacks cities more effectively than the Horseman which it replaces.{unit_horseman_location}

Fast and powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen. Only the Byzantines may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength, defends better, and attacks cities more effectively than the Horseman which it replaces.

Powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen. Only the Carthaginians may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Horseman which it replaces and strikes fear into nearby enemy units. Helps produce Great Generals more quickly.{unit_horseman_location}

Powerful early game Mounted Unit. Weak to Spearmen. Only the Carthaginians may build it. This Unit has a higher [ICON_STRENGTH] Combat Strength than the Horseman which it replaces and strikes fear into nearby enemy units. Helps produce Great Generals more quickly.
Strong Ancient Era Naval Unit used to dominate the seas through melee attacks on naval units and cities. Only the Carthaginians may build it.{unit_trireme_location}
Strong Ancient Era Naval Unit used to dominate the seas through melee attacks on naval units and cities. Only the Carthaginians may build it.
A fast Ranged Unit used for hit-and-run attacks. Only the Huns may build it.{unit_chariot_archer_location}
A fast Ranged Unit used for hit-and-run attacks. Only the Huns may build it.
A fast Mounted Unit used for scouting and hit-and-run attacks. Especially deadly with flank attacks. Only the Austrians may build it.{unit_cavalry_location}
A fast Mounted Unit used for scouting and hit-and-run attacks. Especially deadly with flank attacks. Only the Austrians may build it.
Strong, front-line land Unit that specializes in fighting in rough terrain and defending near the Ethiopian capital. Only the Ethiopians may build it.{unit_rifleman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit that specializes in fighting in rough terrain and defending near the Ethiopian capital. Only the Ethiopians may build it.
Strong, front-line land Unit that specializes in long marches, even far from Swedish lands. Only the Swedish may build it.{unit_rifleman_location}
Strong, front-line land Unit that specializes in long marches, even far from Swedish lands. Only the Swedish may build it.
Elite mounted Unit that specializes in working with Great Generals. Only the Swedish may build it.{unit_lancer_location}
Elite mounted Unit that specializes in working with Great Generals. Only the Swedish may build it.
Siege unit deadly at melee attacks versus cities. Only the Huns may build it.{unit_spearman_location}
Siege unit deadly at melee attacks versus cities. Only the Huns may build it.
Naval Unit that specializes in attacking coastal cities to earn gold and capturing enemy ships. Only the Dutch can build it.{unit_privateer_location}
Naval Unit that specializes in attacking coastal cities to earn gold and capturing enemy ships. Only the Dutch can build it.
Medieval Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas with its ranged attack.{unit_galleass_location}
Medieval Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas with its ranged attack.
Basic Infantry Unit of the Modern Era.{unit_great_war_infantry_location}
Basic Infantry Unit of the Modern Era.
Atomic Era Unit especially useful for embarking and invading across the sea.{unit_marine_location}
Atomic Era Unit especially useful for embarking and invading across the sea.
Early Air Unit designed to intercept incoming enemy aircraft.{unit_triplane_location}
Early Air Unit designed to intercept incoming enemy aircraft.
Early Air Unit that can bombard enemy Units and Cities from the skies.{unit_wwi_bomber_location}
Early Air Unit that can bombard enemy Units and Cities from the skies.
The first of its kind, this powerful late game unit can move after attacking.{unit_wwi_tank_location}
The first of its kind, this powerful late game unit can move after attacking.
Late-game ranged Unit that must be adjacent to an enemy to strike.{unit_machine_gun_location}
Late-game ranged Unit that must be adjacent to an enemy to strike.
Naval Unit that specializes in attacking coastal cities to earn gold and capturing enemy ships.{unit_privateer_location}
Naval Unit that specializes in attacking coastal cities to earn gold and capturing enemy ships.
Ranged infantry Unit of the mid-game that must be adjacent to an enemy to strike.{unit_gatlinggun_location}
Ranged infantry Unit of the mid-game that must be adjacent to an enemy to strike.
Specialized in defeating Knights and other mounted units. Only the Zulu may build it. Also performs a first-strike ranged attack before combat.{unit_pikeman_location}
Specialized in defeating Knights and other mounted units. Only the Zulu may build it. Also performs a first-strike ranged attack before combat.

Heavy Mounted Unit specialized in defeating enemy mounted units. This unit is faster and more powerful than the Lancer, which it replaces. Forces defenders to retreat when it inflicts more damage than it receives. May only be built by the Polish.{unit_lancer_location}

Heavy Mounted Unit specialized in defeating enemy mounted units. This unit is faster and more powerful than the Lancer, which it replaces. Forces defenders to retreat when it inflicts more damage than it receives. May only be built by the Polish.

Establishes sea-based Trade Routes between two civilizations that yields [ICON_GOLD] Gold. Can also be used to deliver [ICON_FOOD] Food or [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production within your own borders after building a Granary or a Workshop.{unit_cargo_ship_location}

Establishes sea-based Trade Routes between two civilizations that yields [ICON_GOLD] Gold. Can also be used to deliver [ICON_FOOD] Food or [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production within your own borders after building a Granary or a Workshop.

Establishes land-based Trade Routes between two civilizations that yields [ICON_GOLD] Gold. Can also be used to deliver [ICON_FOOD] Food or [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production within your own borders after building a Granary or a Workshop.{unit_caravan_location}

Establishes land-based Trade Routes between two civilizations that yields [ICON_GOLD] Gold. Can also be used to deliver [ICON_FOOD] Food or [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production within your own borders after building a Granary or a Workshop.

Archaeologists are a special subtype of Worker that are used to excavate Antiquity Sites to either create Landmark improvements or to extract Artifacts to fill in Great Work of Art slots in Museums, Palaces, Hermitages, and selected Wonders. Archaeologists may work in territory owned by any player. They are consumed once they complete an Archaeological Dig at an Antiquity Site. Archaeologists may not be purchased with [ICON_GOLD] Gold and may only be built in a city with a University.{unit_archaeologist_location}

Archaeologists are a special subtype of Worker that are used to excavate Antiquity Sites to either create Landmark improvements or to extract Artifacts to fill in Great Work of Art slots in Museums, Palaces, Hermitages, and selected Wonders. Archaeologists may work in territory owned by any player. They are consumed once they complete an Archaeological Dig at an Antiquity Site. Archaeologists may not be purchased with [ICON_GOLD] Gold and may only be built in a city with a University.
Powerful melee siege unit which grants a city attack bonus to nearby units when next to an enemy city. May only be built by the Assyrians.{unit_catapult_location}
Powerful melee siege unit which grants a city attack bonus to nearby units when next to an enemy city. May only be built by the Assyrians.
Modern Era infantry unit that earns points toward a [ICON_GOLDEN_AGE] Golden Age when it defeats an enemy. May only be built by Brazil.{unit_infantry_location}
Modern Era infantry unit that earns points toward a [ICON_GOLDEN_AGE] Golden Age when it defeats an enemy. May only be built by Brazil.

Melee naval unit which excels at sea exploration. It has more [ICON_MOVES] Movement than the Caravel, which it replaces, and can perform a one-time ability next to foreign lands to earn [ICON_GOLD] Gold and XP. May only be built by the Portuguese.{unit_caravel_location}

Melee naval unit which excels at sea exploration. It has more [ICON_MOVES] Movement than the Caravel, which it replaces, and can perform a one-time ability next to foreign lands to earn [ICON_GOLD] Gold and XP. May only be built by the Portuguese.

Mounted unit that specializes in Desert warfare and protecting Moroccan lands. Receives combat bonuses when fighting both in Desert tiles and Moroccan territory. May only be built by Morocco.{unit_cavalry_location}
Mounted unit that specializes in Desert warfare and protecting Moroccan lands. Receives combat bonuses when fighting both in Desert tiles and Moroccan territory. May only be built by Morocco.

A brutally powerful Medieval Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas with its ranged attack. Better at attacking and defending than the normal Galleass it replaces, but more expensive. May only be built by Venice.{unit_galleass_location}

A brutally powerful Medieval Era Naval Unit used to wrest control of the seas with its ranged attack. Better at attacking and defending than the normal Galleass it replaces, but more expensive. May only be built by Venice.

Excellent at exploring and fearsome in combat, this Shoshone Unique Unit replaces the Scout. It possesses a promotion that allows it to choose the benefit when uncovering an ancient ruin.{unit_scout_location}
Excellent at exploring and fearsome in combat, this Shoshone Unique Unit replaces the Scout. It possesses a promotion that allows it to choose the benefit when uncovering an ancient ruin.
Mounted unit that specializes in quick attacks. May only be built by the Shoshone.{unit_cavalry_location}
Mounted unit that specializes in quick attacks. May only be built by the Shoshone.
Atomic era ranged Unit that must be adjacent to an enemy to strike.{unit_bazooka_location}
Atomic era ranged Unit that must be adjacent to an enemy to strike.
Classical Era Melee unit that has a mystical weapon whose abilities will be discovered the first time it is used in combat. May only be build by Indonesia.{unit_swordsman_location}
Classical Era Melee unit that has a mystical weapon whose abilities will be discovered the first time it is used in combat. May only be build by Indonesia.

Futuristic infantry unit skilled at dropping into danger from far across the world. Squad can move and pillage after landing but cannot enter combat until the following turn.{unit_xcom_squad_location}
Futuristic infantry unit skilled at dropping into danger from far across the world. Squad can move and pillage after landing but cannot enter combat until the following turn.
